creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Last weeks, I keep getting this same report from the pkg framework about failing to build net-mgmt/telegraf on i386 platform, regardless of the OS version.

It stops with 

---
/usr/local/go120/pkg/tool/freebsd_386/link: mapping output file failed: cannot allocate memory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/telegraf
---

I cannot reproduce this in on my poudriere platform. Could it be a configuration problem with the package cluster? What else can I do to fix. It works for me (tm).

Regards,
Palle


You are receiving this mail as a port that you maintain
is failing to build on the FreeBSD package build server.
Please investigate the failure and submit a PR to fix
build.
